start: 👋 Welcome! 🎬 Send a video, or a YouTube / TikTok / Instagram link — I'll convert it to MP3 instantly. ⚡ Free: 3 conversions per day 💎 Need more? Get Diamonds!
buy-diamonds: 💎 Get Diamonds Each diamond = 1 extra conversion today. 📦 What diamonds unlock: • Extra conversions beyond daily limit • Large files (50 MB+) • YouTube, TikTok, Instagram downloads 💡 Pro tip: 10 💎 pack is the most popular! 🔥 50 💎 pack saves you 30% ⭐ Pay with Telegram Stars

Total: {} ⭐ Telegram Stars

lifetime-desc:

Video, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram — no limits, ever.
too-large: ⚠️ File too large This video exceeds the free limit ({} MB). Use 💎 1 diamond or upgrade to Premium.
no-diamonds: 💎 No diamonds left! Buy more diamonds to continue.
daily-limit: ⛔ Daily limit reached You've used all {limit} free conversions for today. ⏳ Resets in: {time} Continue right now: 💎 Buy diamonds (1 = 1 extra) 👑 Get Lifetime (unlimited forever) 👥 Invite a friend (earn free diamonds)
one-free-left: ⚡ You have 1 free conversion left today! 💡 Running low? Get diamonds to keep going:
used-last-free: ✅ Audio ready! ⚠️ That was your last free conversion for today. ⏳ Resets in: {time} 💎 Get more conversions now:
streak-bonus: 🔥 {n}-day streak! 💎 +{reward} diamonds added to your balance!
queue-wait: ⏳ Your previous video is still processing. Please wait.
server-busy: ⚠️ Server is busy right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
no-audio: 🔇 This video has no audio track.
error-server: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
social-too-long: ⏱️ Video too long. Maximum is {} minutes.
social-error-blocked: Your IP is blocked by {}. Try again later or use a VPN.
social-error-copyright: Content is blocked by copyright in your region.
congrats: 🎉 Success! 💎 {} diamonds have been added to your account!
congrats-lifetime: 🎉 Lifetime Premium Activated! 👑 You now have unlimited access — forever!
admin-gift: 🎁 Gift from Admin! 💎 {count} diamonds have been added to your account.
referral-applied: 🎁 Referral code applied! You'll receive 2 💎 diamonds after your first conversion.
referral-first-start: Please start the bot first with /start
referral-info: 🎁 Your Referral Link {link} For each friend you invite: • You get: 💎 +3 diamonds • Your friend gets: 💎 +2 diamonds (after first conversion) 🏆 Milestone Rewards: • 50 → 5 💎 · 100 → 10 💎 · 200 → 20 💎 · 500 → 50 💎 🔥 Daily streaks of 3, 7, 14, 30 days → bonus diamonds!
referral-bonus: 🎁 Referral bonus! 💎 +2 diamonds for you 💎 +3 diamonds for your inviter
referral-inviter-bonus: 🎉 Referral reward! Your invited friend just made their first conversion. 💎 +3 diamonds added to your balance!
referral-invalid: ⚠️ Invalid referral code or already applied.
referral-share-text: Join this bot with my link and get 2 free diamonds after your first conversion!
limit-invite-tip: 👥 Invite a friend — earn +3 💎 per invite.

subscribe: 📢 Please subscribe to our channel to continue.
not-sub: ❌ You haven't subscribed to the channel yet.
thank-sub:
✅ Thanks for subscribing! You can now use the bot.

🎬 Send a video and I'll extract the audio.
help-text: ❓ How to use 1️⃣ Send a video — file or YouTube/TikTok link 2️⃣ Wait — the bot extracts audio automatically 3️⃣ Download MP3 — save or share it ⚡ Free limit: 3 conversions per day 💎 Need more: buy diamonds or get Lifetime 👥 Free diamonds: invite your friends 🔥 Streak bonus: use the bot 3, 7, 14, 30 days in a row
